author: Disney YouTube
text:
Disney and Pixar's Toy Story 5 | Jodi Benson Hosts Red Carpet Premiere
You've got a friend in D23! See exclusive interviews with D23 Fan-bassador Jodi Benson and the cast at the Toy Story 5 world premiere.   
 
#ToyStory5 is only in theaters June 19
